since_last: 67% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.82%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.58% · Gold +1.34% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 67% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.82%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.82%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +6.58%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +6.58%, MU +6.38%, POWL +6.33%, MRVL +5.97%, TER +5.92%. Laggards: WDAY -5.92%, ADBE -4.77%, INTU -4.63%, CRM -3.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.17% at $121.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
